title: The Lost Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

scenes.narration: In the misty dawn of Westeros, a lone knight mounts his black destrier, seeking honor beyond the iron throne.
scenes.image_prompt: Cinematic sunrise over a misty castle courtyard, detailed armor glinting, black warhorse breathing, dramatic rim lighting, high contrast, epic fantasy style, wide shot

scenes.narration: He bears the sigil of the Seventh House, a golden direwolf entwined with a silver rose, a forgotten lineage.
scenes.image_prompt: Close‑up of a polished shield displaying a golden direwolf wrapped around a silver rose, intricate engravings, soft glow, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field

scenes.narration: His oath: to protect the smallfolk of the Riverlands, even if the great houses turn a blind eye.
scenes.image_prompt: Knight kneeling before a humble village well, children watching, warm amber light, rustic stone walls, emotional atmosphere, cinematic composition

scenes.narration: A sudden raven’s cry warns of an invading raiding party from the Iron Islands.
scenes.image_prompt: Dark skies over a coastal cliff, a single raven silhouetted against a stormy horizon, wind‑swept sea, dramatic chiaroscuro, high detail

scenes.narration: He rallies the farmers, forging makeshift spears, turning fear into fierce resolve.
scenes.image_prompt: Farmers gathering around a roaring forge, molten metal spilling, faces illuminated by firelight, gritty realism, cinematic close‑up

scenes.narration: The battle erupts on the misty field, steel clashing under a blood‑red sky.
scenes.image_prompt: Epic battlefield at twilight, knights charging, arrows arcing, red sky ablaze, dynamic composition, high‑contrast lighting, cinematic scope

scenes.narration: Against overwhelming odds, the knight breaks the enemy’s shield wall with a heroic charge.
scenes.image_prompt: Heroic knight in mid‑lunge, sword raised, shield wall splintering, dust swirling, dramatic backlight, ultra‑realistic detail

scenes.narration: When the last raider falls, the soaked fields echo with the cheers of liberated villagers.
scenes.image_prompt: Villagers celebrating amidst a dew‑covered field, lanterns flickering, sunrise breaking, warm tones, cinematic bokeh

scenes.narration: The knight rides onward, his legend whispered across all seven kingdoms, a reminder that true honor defies crowns.
scenes.image_prompt: Silhouette of the knight on a hilltop, cape fluttering, distant castles across a sprawling landscape, golden hour lighting, epic widescreen
